content:
Hello devs, about a year ago I published here a website and an engine I created to fetch data for a list of framework and calculate how dead a tech is (spoiler alert, your favorite one maybe long gone). The got really popular, the project went full MIT OSS with +200 starts on Github and I continued to receive a fair amount of organic daily visitors without any promotions as I kinda left it behind with the data being fetched daily automatically.
Today, we're releasing a full UI revamp of the website (more simple, falsely academical, free from dead frameworks and Vercel) with a promise to release soon a new version of the engine for a better more accurate Deaditude score, only to prove again that your favorite toy is long gone.
visit it here : https://isthistechdead.com/

  submitted by   /u/jobehi
[link]   [comments]
